_meta.purpose: Per-queue domain knowledge for Stage 0 (situational reasoning). Read by agent_brain._stage0_assess() before SOP matching.
_meta.fill_via: POST /api/kt/structured  →  updates a queue's section without restart.

scan_taxonomy.PICKUP_CREATED: Order created, ready for pickup from seller/origin
scan_taxonomy.OUT_FOR_PICKUP: Pickup rider out to collect from seller
scan_taxonomy.INSCAN: Scanned IN at a hub on arrival (most common arrival event)
scan_taxonomy.MANIFEST_SCAN: Added to outward manifest/bag — committed to forward movement
scan_taxonomy.MANIFEST_RECEIVED: Inbound manifest received at destination hub
scan_taxonomy.DRS_SCAN: Delivery Run Sheet — assigned to FE for delivery
scan_taxonomy.OFD_SCAN: Out For Delivery — FE left hub with shipment
scan_taxonomy.SEC_QC_FAIL: Secondary QC at hub failed (count or condition mismatch)
scan_taxonomy.RTO_IN: Return to origin — scanned inward back at origin
scan_taxonomy.RTO_*: Any scan with RTO_ prefix = same event but on the return-to-origin leg
scan_taxonomy.RVP_*: Reverse Pickup leg (customer returning a delivered shipment)

hardstop.physical_event: Shipment arrived at a hub but was not connected forward within SLA (7 days forward / 5 days reverse). System auto-marks loss against the holding hub.
hardstop.trigger_scans: INWARD_SCAN (or VEHICLE_ARRIVED + MANIFEST_RECEIVED) but no subsequent MANIFEST_SCAN within 7 days (5 for reverse leg). Look for gap between arrival and outward MANIFEST_SCAN.
common_sub_scenarios: HS_1_2 valid scans + SOP not followed

shortage.physical_event: Item count or condition mismatch at a node — fewer items received than the manifest claimed. SEC_QC_FAIL is the canonical scan trigger.
shortage.trigger_scans: SEC_QC_FAIL at a node, or discrepancy between MANIFEST_RECEIVED count vs INWARD_SCAN count

misroute.physical_event: Shipment dispatched to wrong destination hub (sc_migration_issue). Captain has 2 days from VEHICLE_ARRIVED at wrong hub to re-MANIFEST_SCAN. Beyond 2 days = hardstop on original hub.
misroute.trigger_scans: VEHICLE_ARRIVED at hub != intended destination, then MISROUTE-tagged scan or no re-routing within 2 days

pilot_lost_on_field.physical_event: FE left hub with shipment but neither delivered nor returned. CONSIGNMENT_MARKED_LOST follows OFD_SCAN with no DELIVERED/UNDELIVERED.
pilot_lost_on_field.trigger_scans: OFD_SCAN  →  CONSIGNMENT_MARKED_LOST (with no DELIVERED or UNDELIVERED in between)

not_inscanned.physical_event: No INWARD_SCAN at captain's hub — captain claims shipment never reached them.
not_inscanned.trigger_scans: Absence of INWARD_SCAN at the disputed hub. Check LM FE Loss Marked for amount-recovered status.

delivered_unrecorded.physical_event: FE physically handed parcel to customer but didn't mark DELIVERED in app — system marks loss because no DELIVERED scan exists.
delivered_unrecorded.trigger_scans: OFD_SCAN exists, no DELIVERED, no UNDELIVERED, no CONSIGNMENT_MARKED_LOST. Captain provides POD/photo proof.

tech_no_loss.physical_event: Pure tech/scan failure without loss — captain reports something not working but no loss marked yet.
tech_no_loss.trigger_scans: N/A — no scan check needed. Redirect to Log10 team.

tech_with_loss.physical_event: Tech failure that caused or compounded a loss event (e.g. couldn't initiate RTO scan due to app crash, loss got marked).
tech_with_loss.trigger_scans: Mixed signal: tech-failure language + actual loss marking. Captain has proof (screenshot/error).
captain_signals: scan not working AND loss marked

reason_l1_taxonomy.dual_scan_mismatch: Same shipment scanned at two nodes — data conflict, not physical loss
reason_l1_taxonomy.seller_dependency_sop_breached: Captain waited for seller, breached timeline (HS_9 family)
reason_l1_taxonomy.secondary_qc_fail: Failed at SEC_QC scan — usually shortage/damage triggered
reason_l1_taxonomy.rto_vehicle_placement_issue: RTO vehicle didn't show up — placement failure
reason_l1_taxonomy.data_platform_issue: Data platform error — eligible for reversal

metabase_columns.loss_attribution_check: TODO — paste actual columns. Expected: awb, loss_type, attributed_node, loss_date, reason_l1
metabase_columns.lm_fe_loss_marked: TODO — paste actual columns. Expected: awb, amount_recovered, last_status, fe_id
metabase_columns.seller_dependency_attempts: TODO — paste actual columns. Expected: awb, instruction_date, attempt_count, sop_followed_flag

preprocessing_rules: If scan node name has 'PCXX' = Packaging Center → AWB is consolidated. Find parent AWB via Single AWB Tracking, process parent.
If ticket has Bag IDs (UN + digits) but no AWB → enter Bag ID in Valmo 2k24 Lost query to extract AWBs. Do NOT ask captain.
'Delivered' in all loss scenarios = delivered to END CUSTOMER (DELIVERED scan with FE marking), NOT delivered to hub.
Hardstop SLA: 7 days forward leg, 5 days reverse leg, gap measured INWARD_SCAN → MANIFEST_SCAN.
